rule CDB_June_2026_Patch_Tuesday_Microsoft_Patche {

        description = "Detection for June 2026 Patch Tuesday: Microsoft Patches 206 Vulnerabilities Including Three P"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-19"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: [containerd] Patch releases addressing CVE-2026-50195, CVE-2"; content:"CVE-2026-50195"; nocase; sid:5261789; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 77 threat advisories. Of these, 1 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 28 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
